meta.title: MoRoute - Road Safety App
meta.description: Find safer routes with real-time threat updates, SOS support, and trusted travel intelligence.

title.lineOne: Find the safest way to your
title.lineThree: Your safety and peace of mind always come first.

hero.description: Whether you need route risk alerts, live incident updates, or emergency support, MoRoute helps you stay aware and protected on every trip.

stats.label: Estimated risk level for monitored high-alert corridors

features.sectionTitle: MoRoute is a mobile application designed to enhance road safety and security for travelers in Nigeria. The app integrates incident reporting, proactive ahead-of-route alerts, emergency SOS features, and resilience in low connectivity or low battery conditions. We also have a feature where road users can request service when they need it on the app.

items.name: Report Incident
items.description: Report and view kidnappings, robberies, accidents, roadblocks, and checkpoints.

items.name: SOS Emergency
items.description: One-tap distress signal to emergency contacts and authorities with GPS location.

items.name: Community Reports
items.description: Crowdsourced real-time safety information from other users.

items.name: Route Planning
items.description: Compare routes by safety score, get weather updates, and use offline maps.

items.name: Checkpoint Verification
items.description: Verify if police or military checkpoints are legitimate to avoid fake checkpoints.

items.name: Trip Analytics
items.description: Track journey safety, view trip history, and understand route risk patterns.

items.name: Safety Snapshots
items.description: Capture and store evidence such as photos and videos with location context.

items.name: Live Safety Map
items.description: Visual map showing active incidents, danger zones, and verified checkpoints.

items.name: Emergency Contacts
items.description: Store and auto-alert trusted contacts during emergencies.

threats.sectionTitle: We monitor critical road threats in real time

items.title: Kidnapping / Abduction
items.description: Direct kidnappings and militant ambushes in high-risk road corridors target both rural and intercity travelers. Examples include repeated incidents along isolated highways where weak patrol coverage enables fast escape routes.

items.title: Highway Robbery and Armed Assault
items.description: Criminal groups target vehicles at fake checkpoints, road choke points, and low-visibility areas. Attackers use stop-and-search tactics, forced passenger transfers, and rapid escape support vehicles.

items.title: Assaults and Violent Contact Crimes
items.description: Street-level violent attacks, robbery, and harassment occur around bus stops, market zones, and roadside wait points. These incidents increase where lighting, surveillance, and emergency response are limited.

items.title: Road Traffic Crashes and Injuries
items.description: Global road crashes cause over 1 million deaths yearly and millions of serious injuries. High-speed corridors and poor lane discipline remain major contributors in many monitored regions.

cta.title: Get in Touch and Download the App
cta.description: Whether you want to stay informed about potential risks or access real-time safety features, we are here to protect you. Download our app to monitor your surroundings or send us a message if you need assistance.

contact.title: Send us a message
contact.description: Need help, want to partner, or have safety feedback? Fill the form and our team will get back to you quickly.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...
form.successMessage: Thanks! Your message has been received.
